Home / AI Coding Assistants / Aider

Aider — open source alternative

AI pair programming in your terminal.

Strengths

  • Git-aware — edits files and commits for you.
  • Works with any OpenAI-compatible model.
  • Lightweight — runs as a CLI.

Weaknesses

  • Terminal-based — no GUI for editors.
  • Model API usage costs can climb on large repos.
  • Not a code-completion tool (different UX from Copilot).
License: Apache-2.0 Self-host difficulty: 1/5 Self-host onlyDesktop: Windows, macOS, Linux

Official site · Source on GitHub

Ad slot — OSS middle

Aider is used as an alternative to

GitHub Copilot

AI pair programmer trained on public code.

See all alternatives →
